newString:
model Plan {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid())
  name              String
  type              String
  description       String?

  monthlyPrice      Decimal?
  annualPrice       Decimal?
  currency          String?

  maxCompanies      Int?
  maxClients        Int?

  isActive          Boolean  @default(true)
  sortOrder         Int?

  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt

  features          PlanFeature[]

  @@index([isActive])
  @@index([sortOrder])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  subscriptions Subscription[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Plan for missing relations

newString:
model WorkspaceUser {
  workspaceId String @map("tenantId")
  userId    String
  // roleId is the single source of truth for workspace roles
  roleId    String
  isOwner   Boolean   @default(false)
  joinedAt  DateTime  @default(now())
  lastAccessedAt DateTime?
  invitedBy String?
  invitedAt DateTime?
  status    String    @default("ACTIVE")
  deletedAt DateTime?

  workspace     Workspace  @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  invitedByUser User?     @relation("InvitedUsers", fields: [invitedBy], references: [id])
  classId       String?
  class         Class?    @relation(fields: [classId], references: [id])
  locationId    String?
  location      Location? @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  projectId     String?
  project       Project?  @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  user          User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  Role          Role?     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id])
  // Tasks assigned to this workspace user
  assignedTasks Task[]    @relation("WorkspaceUserAssignedTasks")

  // Composite id prevents duplicate membership
  @@id([workspaceId, userId])
  @@index([roleId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([workspaceId, lastAccessedAt])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  companyUsers CompanyUser[]
  practiceUsers PracticeUser[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to WorkspaceUser for missing relations

newString:
model JournalEntry {
  id            String        @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId   String        @map("tenantId")
  companyId     String
  entryNumber   String?       @unique
  date          DateTime
  description   String?
  createdAt     DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime      @updatedAt
  createdById    String?
  updatedById    String?
  createdBy      User?         @relation("JournalEntry_createdBy", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  updatedBy      User?         @relation("JournalEntry_updatedBy", fields: [updatedById], references: [id])
  postingStatus PostingStatus @default(DRAFT)
  currency      String?
  exchangeRate  Decimal?      @db.Decimal(28, 12)
  baseTotal     Decimal?      @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  deletedAt     DateTime?

  workspace             Workspace                @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  lines                 JournalEntryLine[]
  company               Company                @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  invoices              Invoice[]              @relation("JournalEntry_Invoices")
  bills                 Bill[]                 @relation("JournalEntry_Bills")
  paymentsReceived      PaymentReceived[]      @relation("JournalEntry_PaymentsReceived")
  billPayments          BillPayment[]          @relation("JournalEntry_BillPayments")
  inventoryTransactions InventoryTransaction[] @relation("JournalEntry_InventoryTransactions")
  revenueSchedules      RevenueSchedule[]      @relation("JournalEntry_RevenueSchedules")
  bankDeposits          BankDeposit[]          @relation("JournalEntry_BankDeposits")
  customerRefunds       CustomerRefund[]       @relation("JournalEntry_CustomerRefunds")
  vendorRefunds         VendorRefund[]         @relation("JournalEntry_VendorRefunds")
  writeOffs             WriteOff[]             @relation("JournalEntry_WriteOffs")

  @@index([workspaceId, date])
  @@index([companyId, date])
  @@index([companyId, postingStatus])
  @@index([companyId, postingStatus, date])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, date, postingStatus, deletedAt])
  @@index([createdById])
  @@index([updatedById])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  intercompanyTransactions IntercompanyTransaction[] @relation("IntercompanyFromJE")
  intercompanyTransactions IntercompanyTransaction[] @relation("IntercompanyToJE")
  consolidationEntries ConsolidationEntry[]
  depreciationJournals DepreciationJournal[]
  currencyRevaluations CurrencyRevaluation[]
  closingEntries ClosingEntry[]
  yearEndCloses YearEndClose[]
  dividends Dividend[]
  payrollTaxPayments PayrollTaxPayment[]
  accrualEntries AccrualEntry[]
  payrollAccruals PayrollAccrual[]
  cOGSRecognitions COGSRecognition[]
  productionRuns ProductionRun[]
  form2307s Form2307[]
  creditNotes CreditNote[]
  debitNotes DebitNote[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to JournalEntry for missing relations

newString:
model FixedAsset {
  id                        String             @id @default(uuid())
  companyId                 String
  categoryId                String?
  name                      String
  description               String?
  acquisitionDate           DateTime
  cost                      Decimal            @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  salvageValue              Decimal?           @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  usefulLifeMonths          Int?
  depreciationMethod        DepreciationMethod @default(STRAIGHT_LINE)
  status                    AssetStatus        @default(ACTIVE)
  assetAccountId            String?            @db.Text
  accumulatedDepreciationId String?            @db.Text
  depreciationExpenseAccountId String?         @db.Text
  createdAt                 DateTime           @default(now())

  company       Company                  @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  category      FixedAssetCategory?      @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  assetAccount  Account?                 @relation("FixedAsset_assetAccount", fields: [assetAccountId], references: [id])
  accumAccount  Account?                 @relation("FixedAsset_accumAccount", fields: [accumulatedDepreciationId], references: [id])
  depreciationExpenseAccount Account?   @relation("FixedAsset_depreciationExpense", fields: [depreciationExpenseAccountId], references: [id])
  depreciations FixedAssetDepreciation[]
  disposals     AssetDisposal[]
  impairments   AssetImpairment[]
  revaluations  AssetRevaluation[]
  maintenances  AssetMaintenance[]
  insurances    AssetInsurance[]

  @@index([companyId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  fixedAssetSchedules FixedAssetSchedule[]
  depreciationAccounts DepreciationAccount[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to FixedAsset for missing relations

newString:
model Account {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  companyId String
  code      String
  name      String
  typeId    Int
  parentId  String?
  currency  String   @default("USD")
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  isSystem  Boolean  @default(false)
  cashFlowType String? // OPERATING, INVESTING, FINANCING
  cashFlowCategoryId String?
  normalSide NormalSide? // optional override of the AccountType normalSide
  balance   Decimal  @default(0) @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  company                  Company              @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  type                     AccountType          @relation(fields: [typeId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  cashFlowCategory          CashFlowCategory?   @relation(fields: [cashFlowCategoryId], references: [id])
  children                 Account[]            @relation("acct_children")
  parent                   Account?             @relation("acct_children", fields: [parentId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  journalLines             JournalEntryLine[]
  AccountSubType           AccountSubType?      @relation(fields: [accountSubTypeId], references: [id])
  accountSubTypeId         Int?
  OpeningBalance           OpeningBalance[]
  TaxCodeAccount           TaxCodeAccount[]
  BillLine                 BillLine[]
  VendorCreditLine         VendorCreditLine[]
  BudgetLine               BudgetLine[]
  CustomerCreditLine       CustomerCreditLine[]
  fixedAssetAsAssetAccount FixedAsset[]         @relation("FixedAsset_assetAccount")
  fixedAssetAsAccumAccount FixedAsset[]         @relation("FixedAsset_accumAccount")

  @@unique([companyId, code])
  @@index([companyId, name])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  depreciationAccounts DepreciationAccount[] @relation("DepreciationAccount_expense")
  depreciationAccounts DepreciationAccount[] @relation("DepreciationAccount_accum")
  accountBalanceAudits AccountBalanceAudit[]
  currencyRevaluationEntries CurrencyRevaluationEntry[]
  yearEndCloses YearEndClose[] @relation("YearEndClose_RE")
  yearEndCloses YearEndClose[] @relation("YearEndClose_IS")
  equityAccounts EquityAccount[]
  payrollTaxLiabilities PayrollTaxLiability[]
  accrualSchedules AccrualSchedule[] @relation("AccrualSchedule_Account")
  accrualSchedules AccrualSchedule[] @relation("AccrualSchedule_OffsetAccount")
  accountSegments AccountSegment[]
  items Item[] @relation("Item_cogsAccount")
  items Item[] @relation("Item_inventoryReserve")
  payrollAccruals PayrollAccrual[]
  productionRuns ProductionRun[]
  deferredTaxs DeferredTax[]
  withholdingTaxDeductions WithholdingTaxDeduction[] @relation("WithholdingTax_Account")
  finalTaxDeductions FinalTaxDeduction[] @relation("FinalTax_Account")
  percentageTaxs PercentageTax[] @relation("PercentageTax_Account")
  philippinePayrollDeductions PhilippinePayrollDeduction[] @relation("PhilPayrollDeduction_Account")
  defaultAccountMappings DefaultAccountMapping[]
  expenseClaimLines ExpenseClaimLine[]
  cashOverShortEntries CashOverShortEntry[]
  cashOverShortRules CashOverShortRule[]
  pettyCashFunds PettyCashFund[]
  pettyCashVouchers PettyCashVoucher[]
  writeOffs WriteOff[]
  subsidiaryLedgers SubsidiaryLedger[]
  budgetActualComparisons BudgetActualComparison[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Account for missing relations

  id              String   @id @default(uuid())

  name            String

  @@index([isActive])

  recurringSchedules RecurringSchedule[]

}

newString:
model User {
  id               String   @id @default(uuid())
  // Unique email = login safety + implicit index for fast sign-in
  email            String   @unique
  // System-level role only (workspace roles live on WorkspaceUser)
  systemRole       String   @default("user") @map("role")
  name             String?
  password         String   @map("passwordhash")
  isEmailVerified  Boolean  @default(false) @map("isemailverified")
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt
  // optional fields used by existing mock code
  resetToken       String?  @map("resettoken") @db.Text
  resetTokenExpiry Int?     @map("resettokenexpiry")


  sessions           Session[]
  // Preferred hub (owner vs accountant) used to route users on sign-in
  preferredHub       PreferredHub?

  // Contact fields
  phone              String?  @db.Text
  // HMAC of normalized phone for privacy-safe lookups
  phoneHmac          String?  @map("phone_hmac") @db.Text

  // Verified phone state
  isPhoneVerified    Boolean  @default(false) @map("isphoneverified")
  phoneVerifiedAt    DateTime? @map("phoneverifiedat")
  // Audit reviewer flag for governance workflows
  auditReviewer      Boolean  @default(false)
  
  @@index([phoneHmac])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([email, isEmailVerified])
  @@index([phone, isPhoneVerified])

  // relation back to security events (optional)

  securityEvents      UserSecurityEvent[]
  ownedWorkspaces     Workspace[]        @relation("WorkspaceOwner")
  workspaceUsers      WorkspaceUser[]
  invitedWorkspaceUsers  WorkspaceUser[]        @relation("InvitedUsers")
  sentWorkspaceInvites   WorkspaceInvite[]      @relation("WorkspaceInviteInvitedBy")
  timesheetApprovals  TimesheetApproval[]
  auditLogs           AuditLog[]
  // Tasks relations
  tasksCreated        Task[]
  taskComments        TaskComment[]
  aiInsightComments   AiInsightComment[]
  aiChatSessions      AiChatSession[]
  aiQueryLogs         AiQueryLog[]
  documentApprovals   DocumentApproval[]
  pettyCashVouchersApproved PettyCashVoucher[]
  timeOffRequestsApproved TimeOffRequest[]
  taxCalculationAudits     TaxCalculationAudit[]
  taxPeriodLocks           TaxPeriodLock[]
  userActionAudits         UserActionAudit[]
  // Attachments uploaded by this user
  attachmentsUploaded Attachment[]
  // Dunning and approvals
  dunningNoticesSent     DunningNotice[]
  inventoryAdjustmentRequests InventoryAdjustmentRequest[]
  inventoryAdjustmentApprovals InventoryAdjustmentApproval[]
  salesTaxReturnsFiled   SalesTaxReturn[]

  // Audit Relations
  invoicesCreated        Invoice[]             @relation("Invoice_createdBy")
  invoicesUpdated        Invoice[]             @relation("Invoice_updatedBy")
  journalEntriesCreated  JournalEntry[]        @relation("JournalEntry_createdBy")
  journalEntriesUpdated  JournalEntry[]        @relation("JournalEntry_updatedBy")
  billsCreated           Bill[]                @relation("Bill_createdBy")
  billsUpdated           Bill[]                @relation("Bill_updatedBy")
  receivedPaymentsCreated PaymentReceived[]    @relation("PaymentReceived_createdBy")
  receivedPaymentsUpdated PaymentReceived[]    @relation("PaymentReceived_updatedBy")
  billPaymentsCreated    BillPayment[]         @relation("BillPayment_createdBy")
  billPaymentsUpdated    BillPayment[]         @relation("BillPayment_updatedBy")
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  workflows Workflow[]
  depositSlips DepositSlip[] @relation("DepositSlip_PreparedBy")
  depositSlips DepositSlip[] @relation("DepositSlip_LastPrintedBy")
  refundApprovals RefundApproval[]
  risks Risk[]
  notificationPreferences NotificationPreference[]
  apiKeys ApiKey[]
  externalSystemAccessLogs ExternalSystemAccessLog[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to User for missing relations

model Fund {
  id             String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId    String   @map("tenantId")
  companyId      String
  
  name           String   // e.g. "General Operating Fund", "Scholarship Fund"
  code           String   @unique // e.g., "100", "200"
  type           String   // UNRESTRICTED, TEMPORARILY_RESTRICTED, PERMANENTLY_RESTRICTED
  
  description    String?
  startDate      DateTime?
  endDate        DateTime? // If grant-specific
  
  balance        Decimal  @default(0) @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  isActive       Boolean  @default(true)
  
  workspace      Workspace @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  company        Company   @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  
  allocations    FundAllocation[]
  segments       AccountSegment[] // Linking GL accounts to Funds (Fund Accounting)

  @@index([companyId, type])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  donations Donation[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Fund for missing relations

newString:
model BillPayment {
  id                    String   @id @default(uuid())
  companyId             String?
  workspaceId           String   @map("tenantId")
  billId                String
  amount                Decimal  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  paymentDate           DateTime @default(now())
  method                String
  referenceNumber       String?
  bankAccountId         String?
  vendorPaymentMethodId String?
  currency              String?
  exchangeRate          Decimal? @db.Decimal(28, 12)
  baseAmount            Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  workspace              Workspace                @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  bill                   Bill                     @relation(fields: [billId], references: [id])
  bankAccount            BankAccount?             @relation(fields: [bankAccountId], references: [id])
  vendorPaymentMethod    VendorPaymentMethod?     @relation(fields: [vendorPaymentMethodId], references: [id])
  company                Company?                 @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  BillPaymentApplication BillPaymentApplication[]
  refunds                VendorRefund[]
  journalEntryId         String?
  journalEntry           JournalEntry?            @relation("JournalEntry_BillPayments", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])

  createdById      String?
  updatedById      String?
  createdBy        User?                    @relation("BillPayment_createdBy", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  updatedBy        User?                    @relation("BillPayment_updatedBy", fields: [updatedById], references: [id])

  @@index([workspaceId, billId])
  @@index([createdById])
  @@index([updatedById])
  @@index([companyId, billId])
  @@index([journalEntryId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, paymentDate, deletedAt])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  contractorPayments ContractorPayment[]
  checks Check[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to BillPayment for missing relations

newString:
model DocumentTemplate {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId String   @map("tenantId")
  companyId   String
  
  name        String   // e.g., "Legal Professional", "Construction Progress"
  type        DocumentTemplateType
  industry    String?  // "LEGAL", "CONSTRUCTION", "RETAIL", "GENERAL"
  description String? 
  
  // Customization Engine
  // { "layout": "modern", "columns": ["sku", "desc", "qty", "rate", "amount"], "showHeader": true }
  structure   Json     
  // { "primaryColor": "#0055ff", "font": "Roboto", "logoWidth": "200px" }
  design      Json     
  // { "footerNote": "Net 30 Terms", "termsUrl": "...", "thankYouMessage": "We value your business!" }
  content     Json

  previewThumbnailUrl String? // URL to a preview image of the template

  deletedAt    DateTime?
  isDefault    Boolean  @default(false)
  isActive     Boolean  @default(true)
  
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt

  workspace    Workspace @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  company      Company   @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  
  invoices     Invoice[]
  versions     DocumentTemplateVersion[]
  signatures   DocumentSignature[]

  @@unique([companyId, type, name])
  @@index([companyId, type, isDefault])
  @@index([companyId, industry])
  @@index([companyId])

  // NOTE: To enforce a single default template per (companyId, type),
  // create a partial unique index in Postgres (Prisma currently doesn't support partial unique indexes):
  // docs/migrations/003_unique_default_template.sql
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  paychecks Paycheck[]
  quotes Quote[]
  creditNotes CreditNote[]
  customerStatements CustomerStatement[]
  depositSlips DepositSlip[]
  checks Check[]
  purchaseOrders PurchaseOrder[]
  vendorCredits VendorCredit[]
  customerCredits CustomerCredit[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to DocumentTemplate for missing relations

newString:
model Employee {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  companyId       String
  contactId       String? // optional link to Contact
  employeeNumber  String?
  firstName       String
  lastName        String
  taxId           String?
  ssnHash         String?   @db.Text
  hireDate        DateTime?
  terminationDate DateTime?
  payRate         Decimal?  @db.Decimal(12, 2) // default hourly/salary rate
  payType         String? // SALARY | HOURLY
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt

  company               Company               @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  // back-references for payroll relations
  payrollRunEmployees   PayrollRunEmployee[]
  paychecks             Paycheck[]
  // Time tracking back-relations
  timesheets            Timesheet[]
  timeEntries           TimeEntry[]
  taxInfo               EmployeeTaxInfo?
  i9Form                FormI9?
  // Philippine-specific deductions
  payrollDeductions     PhilippinePayrollDeduction[]
  employeeLoans         EmployeeLoan[]
  loanPayments          EmployeeLoanPayment[]
  timeOffBalances       TimeOffBalance[]
  timeOffRequests       TimeOffRequest[]
  thirteenthMonthPays   ThirteenthMonthPay[]
  governmentContributionPayments GovernmentContributionPayment[]

  @@index([companyId])
  @@unique([companyId, employeeNumber])
  @@unique([companyId, taxId])
  @@unique([companyId, ssnHash])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  payrollAccruals PayrollAccrual[]
  expenseClaims ExpenseClaim[]
  pettyCashFunds PettyCashFund[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Employee for missing relations

model Item {
  id                      String                     @id @default(uuid())
  companyId               String
  sku                     String?
  name                    String
  type                    String
  salesPrice              Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(20, 4) // Base sales price
  purchaseCost            Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(20, 4) // Base purchase cost
  standardCost            Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(20, 4) // Standard cost for variance analysis
  discountAllowed         Boolean                    @default(true)
  maxDiscountPercent      Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  
  trackingType            String?                    @default("NONE") // NONE, SERIAL, LOT
  createdAt               DateTime                   @default(now())
  inventoryAssetAccountId String?
  cogsAccountId           String?
  inventoryReserveAccountId String?
  costMethod              String?                    @default("FIFO")
  InvoiceLine             InvoiceLine[]
  BillLine                BillLine[]
  PurchaseOrderLine       PurchaseOrderLine[]
  stockLevels             StockLevel[]
  inventoryLines          InventoryTransactionLine[]
  costLayers              InventoryCostLayer[]
  priceListItems          PriceListItem[]
  // Assembly relations
  assemblyBuilds          AssemblyBuild[]      @relation("ItemBuilt")
  assemblyComponents      AssemblyComponent[]  @relation("ItemComponent")
  cogsAccount             Account?                   @relation("Item_cogsAccount", fields: [cogsAccountId], references: [id])
  inventoryReserveAccount Account?                   @relation("Item_inventoryReserve", fields: [inventoryReserveAccountId], references: [id])
  company                 Company                    @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([companyId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  inventoryReserves InventoryReserve[]
  cOGSRecognitions COGSRecognition[]
  productionRuns ProductionRun[]
  quoteLines QuoteLine[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Item for missing relations

newString:
model InvoiceLine {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  companyId       String
  invoiceId       String
  workspaceId     String @map("tenantId")
  itemId          String?
  description     String
  quantity        Decimal  @db.Decimal(12, 4)
  unitPrice       Decimal  @map("rate") @db.Decimal(16, 6)
  totalPrice      Decimal  @map("amount") @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  discountPercent Decimal? @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  discountAmount  Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)

  invoice    Invoice   @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  item       Item?     @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  workspace  Workspace @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  company    Company   @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  classId    String?
  class      Class?    @relation(fields: [classId], references: [id])
  locationId String?
  location   Location? @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  projectId  String?
  project    Project?  @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  LineTax    LineTax[]
  revenueSchedules RevenueSchedule[]

  @@index([workspaceId])
  @@index([workspaceId, itemId])
  @@index([workspaceId, invoiceId])
  @@index([companyId, invoiceId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  cOGSRecognitions COGSRecognition[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to InvoiceLine for missing relations

model InventoryTransactionLine {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId     String   @map("tenantId")
  companyId       String?
  transactionId   String
  itemId          String
  stockLocationId String?
  qty             Decimal  @db.Decimal(28, 6)
  unitCost        Decimal? @db.Decimal(28, 6)
  lineType        String?
  serialNumber    String?
  lotNumber       String?
  expirationDate  DateTime?

  workspace     Workspace               @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  transaction   InventoryTransaction @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  item          Item                 @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  stockLocation StockLocation?       @relation(fields: [stockLocationId], references: [id])
  costLayers    InventoryCostLayer[] @relation("tx_line_costlayers")
  company       Company?             @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  classId       String?
  class         Class?               @relation(fields: [classId], references: [id])
  locationId    String?
  location      Location?            @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  projectId     String?
  project       Project?             @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])

  @@index([workspaceId, itemId])
  @@index([workspaceId, transactionId])
  @@index([companyId, itemId])
  @@index([itemId, stockLocationId])
  @@index([transactionId, itemId])
  @@index([serialNumber])
  @@index([lotNumber])
  @@index([expirationDate])
  @@unique([itemId, serialNumber], name: "item_serial_unique")
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  cOGSRecognitions COGSRecognition[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to InventoryTransactionLine for missing relations

model InventoryTransaction {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId       String   @map("tenantId")
  companyId         String?
  transactionNumber String?
  type              String // RECEIPT, SHIPMENT, TRANSFER, ADJUSTMENT
  reference         String?
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  deletedAt         DateTime?

  purchaseOrderId String?
  purchaseOrder   PurchaseOrder? @relation(fields: [purchaseOrderId], references: [id])

  workspace       Workspace                  @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])

  postingStatus  PostingStatus              @default(DRAFT)
  company        Company?                   @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  journalEntryId String?
  journalEntry   JournalEntry?              @relation("JournalEntry_InventoryTransactions", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  invoiceId      String?
  invoice        Invoice?                   @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id])

  @@index([workspaceId, transactionNumber])
  @@index([workspaceId, createdAt])
  @@index([journalEntryId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  inventoryAdjustmentRequests InventoryAdjustmentRequest[]
}

newString:
model Country {
  id                  String   @id @default(uuid())
  code                CountryCode @unique
  name                String
  defaultCurrency     String   @default("USD")
  defaultTaxYear      Int?
  taxSystem           Json?    // Stored configuration for tax rules
  defaultWithholdingRates Json?
  defaultVatRate      Decimal? @db.Decimal(10, 6)
  defaultCorporateTaxRate Decimal? @db.Decimal(10, 6)
  createdAt           DateTime @default(now())

  // Localization & display preferences
  locale              String?  // e.g., "en-PH" (IETF language tag)
  preferredLanguage   String?  // e.g., "en", "fil"
  timeZone            String?  // e.g., "Asia/Manila"
  dateFormat          String?  // e.g., "YYYY-MM-DD"

  companies               Company[]
  jurisdictions          TaxJurisdiction[]
  taxRates                TaxRate[]
  birFormTemplates        BirFormTemplate[]
  chartOfAccountsTemplates ChartOfAccountsTemplate[]
  localTaxTypes           LocalTaxTypeConfig[]
  taxModules              CountryTaxModule[]
  taxTreatiesFrom         TaxTreaty[] @relation("TreatyFrom")
  taxTreatiesTo           TaxTreaty[] @relation("TreatyTo")
  nexusRecords            Nexus[]

  @@index([code])
  @@index([locale])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  taxAuthorities TaxAuthority[]
  taxPeriodLocks TaxPeriodLock[]
  taxCalendars TaxCalendar[]
  complianceDeadlines ComplianceDeadline[]
  taxAttributeCarryforwards TaxAttributeCarryforward[]
  taxIncentives TaxIncentive[]
  taxRules TaxRule[]
  vatRegistrations VatRegistration[]
  documentRetentions DocumentRetention[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Country for missing relations

model TaxReturn {
  id               String   @id @default(uuid())
  companyId        String
  authorityId      String
  formType         String   // 2550Q, 941, VAT100, GST-7
  periodStart      DateTime
  periodEnd        DateTime
  filingDeadline   DateTime
  status           FilingStatus @default(DRAFT)
  filedAt          DateTime?
  dueDate          DateTime?
  totalTax         Decimal  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  totalPenalty     Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  totalInterest    Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  paymentDeadline  DateTime?
  referenceNumber  String?
  efilingReference String?
  efilingStatus    String?
  efilingSubmittedAt DateTime?
  efilingResponse  Json?
  attachmentId     String?
  filingMethod     TaxFilingMethod?
  notes            String?  @db.Text
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())

  company   Company      @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  authority TaxAuthority @relation(fields: [authorityId], references: [id])
  attachment Attachment? @relation(fields: [attachmentId], references: [id])
  lines     TaxReturnLine[]
  payments  TaxPayment[]
  amendments TaxReturnAmendment[]

  @@unique([companyId, authorityId, formType, periodStart])
  @@index([companyId, periodStart, periodEnd])
  @@index([filingDeadline])
  @@index([attachmentId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  taxObligations TaxObligation[]
  taxAuditCases TaxAuditCase[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to TaxReturn for missing relations

model TaxRate {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid())
  companyId     String
  countryId     String?   // Link to country for jurisdiction-specific rules
  jurisdictionId String? // Link to sub-national jurisdiction when applicable
  name          String
  rate          Decimal   @db.Decimal(10, 6)
  // Optional global tax attributes
  jurisdictionLevel String? // FEDERAL, STATE, COUNTY, CITY, SPECIAL
  taxType           String? // VAT, GST, SALES_TAX, WITHHOLDING, etc.
  globalTaxType     GlobalTaxType?
  thresholdAmount   Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  exemptionAmount   Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  effectiveFrom DateTime
  effectiveTo   DateTime?
  isCompound    Boolean   @default(false)
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())

  company     Company        @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  country     Country?       @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])
  jurisdiction TaxJurisdiction? @relation(fields: [jurisdictionId], references: [id])
  TaxCodeRate TaxCodeRate[]
  LineTax     LineTax[]

  @@index([companyId, jurisdictionId, effectiveFrom])
  @@index([countryId, jurisdictionId])
  @@index([taxType])
  @@index([globalTaxType])
  @@index([jurisdictionLevel])
  @@index([companyId, taxType, effectiveFrom])
  @@index([countryId, jurisdictionId, taxType, effectiveFrom])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  taxReturnLines TaxReturnLine[]
  salesTaxReturnLines SalesTaxReturnLine[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to TaxRate for missing relations

model Invoice {
  id             String    @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId    String    @map("tenantId")
  companyId      String
  invoiceNumber  String?
  customerId     String
  status         InvoiceStatus    @default(DRAFT)
  paymentStatus  PaymentStatus @default(DRAFT)
  totalAmount    Decimal   @map("total") @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  balance        Decimal   @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  currency       String?
  exchangeRate   Decimal?  @db.Decimal(28, 12)
  baseTotal      Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  transactionType TransactionType?
  discountAmount Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  shippingAmount Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  otherCharges   Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  withholdingTaxAmount Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  finalTaxAmount       Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  date           DateTime  @default(now()) @map("issuedAt")
  dueDate        DateTime?
  paymentTermId  String?
  paymentTerm    PaymentTerm? @relation(fields: [paymentTermId], references: [id])
  deletedAt      DateTime?

  createdById   String?
  updatedById   String?
  createdBy     User? @relation("Invoice_createdBy", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  updatedBy     User? @relation("Invoice_updatedBy", fields: [updatedById], references: [id])
  
  // Customization
  templateId    String?
  template      DocumentTemplate? @relation(fields: [templateId], references: [id])

  workspace                  Workspace                   @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  customer                   Customer                    @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [contactId])
  lines                      InvoiceLine[]
  journalEntryId             String?
  journalEntry               JournalEntry?               @relation("JournalEntry_Invoices", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  postingStatus              PostingStatus               @default(DRAFT)
  company                    Company                     @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  InvoicePaymentApplication  InvoicePaymentApplication[]
  customerCreditApplications CustomerCreditApplication[] @relation("Invoice_CreditApplications")
  inventoryTransactions      InventoryTransaction[]
  quotes                     Quote[]                     @relation("QuoteToInvoice")
  writeOffs                  WriteOff[]

  @@unique([companyId, invoiceNumber])
  @@index([workspaceId, status, dueDate])
  @@index([workspaceId, date])
  @@index([workspaceId, customerId, status])
  @@index([companyId, customerId, status])
  @@index([companyId, date])
  @@index([createdById])
  @@index([updatedById])
  @@index([companyId, postingStatus, date])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, status, dueDate, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, dueDate, balance, status])
  @@index([companyId, status, dueDate, balance])
  @@index([companyId, paymentStatus, dueDate])
  @@index([companyId, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, dueDate, balance, status, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, customerId, dueDate, balance])
  @@index([companyId, templateId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  creditNotes CreditNote[]
  dunningNotices DunningNotice[]
  paymentReminders PaymentReminder[]
  disputes Dispute[]
  chargebacks Chargeback[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Invoice for missing relations

model Bill {
  id             String    @id @default(uuid())
  companyId      String
  workspaceId    String   @map("tenantId")
  vendorId       String
  billNumber     String?
  status         BillStatus    @default(DRAFT)
  paymentStatus  PaymentStatus @default(DRAFT)
  total          Decimal   @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  balance        Decimal   @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  currency       String?
  exchangeRate   Decimal?  @db.Decimal(28, 12)
  baseTotal      Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  transactionType TransactionType?
  discountAmount Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  shippingAmount Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  otherCharges   Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  withholdingTaxAmount Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  creditableWithholding Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  issuedAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  dueAt          DateTime?
  paymentTermId  String?
  paymentTerm    PaymentTerm? @relation(fields: [paymentTermId], references: [id])
  description    String?
  deletedAt      DateTime?

  workspace              Workspace                @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  vendor                 Vendor                   @relation(fields: [vendorId], references: [contactId])
  lines                  BillLine[]
  payments               BillPayment[]
  journalEntryId         String?
  journalEntry           JournalEntry?            @relation("JournalEntry_Bills", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  postingStatus          PostingStatus            @default(DRAFT)
  company                Company                  @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  BillPaymentApplication BillPaymentApplication[]
  writeOffs              WriteOff[]

  createdById      String?
  updatedById      String?
  createdBy        User?                    @relation("Bill_createdBy", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  updatedBy        User?                    @relation("Bill_updatedBy", fields: [updatedById], references: [id])

  @@unique([companyId, vendorId, billNumber])
  @@index([createdById])
  @@index([updatedById])
  @@index([workspaceId, status])
  @@index([workspaceId, vendorId])
  @@index([workspaceId, vendorId, status])
  @@index([companyId, vendorId, status])
  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([workspaceId, issuedAt])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, status, dueAt, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, postingStatus, issuedAt])
  @@index([companyId, status, dueAt, balance])
  @@index([companyId, paymentStatus, dueAt])
  @@index([companyId, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, dueAt, balance, status, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, vendorId, dueAt, balance])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  debitNotes DebitNote[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Bill for missing relations

newString:
model Subscription {
  id                   String            @id @default(uuid())
  // Exactly one of companyId or practiceId should be set at the application layer
  companyId            String?           // company owner (nullable for practice-owned subscriptions)
  practiceId           String?           // practice owner (nullable for company-owned subscriptions)
  planId               String
  status               SubscriptionStatus @default(ACTIVE)
  currentPeriodStart   DateTime?
  currentPeriodEnd     DateTime?
  stripeCustomerId     String?
  stripeSubscriptionId String?            @unique
  createdAt            DateTime           @default(now())

  // Enforce XOR ownership with a DB check constraint (see docs/db_constraints.sql)
  company  Company?  @relation("CompanySubscription", fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  practice Practice? @relation("PracticeSubscription", fields: [practiceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  plan     Plan?      @relation(fields: [planId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([practiceId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([planId])
  @@unique([companyId])
  @@unique([practiceId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  subscriptionReminders SubscriptionReminder[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Subscription for missing relations

model PaymentReceived {
  id           String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId  String   @map("tenantId")
  companyId    String
  customerId   String
  amount       Decimal  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  paymentDate  DateTime
  paymentMethodId String?
  bankAccountId   String?
  referenceNumber String? // Check #, Trans ID
  isDeposited  Boolean  @default(false)
  undepositedBatchId String?
  
  currency     String?
  exchangeRate Decimal? @db.Decimal(28, 12)
  baseAmount   Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  deletedAt    DateTime?

  workspace                 Workspace                   @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  paymentMethod             PaymentMethod?              @relation(fields: [paymentMethodId], references: [id])
  bankAccount               BankAccount?                @relation(fields: [bankAccountId], references: [id])
  company                   Company                     @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  customer                  Customer                    @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [contactId])
  InvoicePaymentApplication InvoicePaymentApplication[]
  refunds                   CustomerRefund[]
  bankDepositLines          BankDepositLine[]
  undepositedBatch           UndepositedFundsBatch?      @relation(fields: [undepositedBatchId], references: [id])
  journalEntryId            String?
  journalEntry              JournalEntry?               @relation("JournalEntry_PaymentsReceived", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])

  updatedById      String?

  updatedBy        User?                       @relation("PaymentReceived_updatedBy", fields: [updatedById], references: [id])

  @@index([workspaceId, paymentDate])
  @@index([createdById])
  @@index([updatedById])
  @@index([companyId, paymentDate])
  @@index([bankAccountId])
  @@index([journalEntryId])
  @@index([undepositedBatchId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, paymentDate, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, paymentDate, isDeposited, deletedAt])

}

model PurchaseOrder {
  id                     String        @id @default(uuid())
  companyId              String
  workspaceId            String   @map("tenantId")
  vendorId               String
  poNumber               String?
  status                 PurchaseOrderStatus        @default(OPEN)
  postingStatus          PostingStatus @default(DRAFT)
  total                  Decimal       @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  createdAt              DateTime      @default(now())
  expectedAt             DateTime?
  receivedAt             DateTime?
  inventoryTransactionId String?
  deletedAt              DateTime?
  templateId             String?

  workspace             Workspace              @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  company               Company                @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  vendor                Vendor                 @relation(fields: [vendorId], references: [contactId])
  template              DocumentTemplate?      @relation(fields: [templateId], references: [id])
  lines                 PurchaseOrderLine[]
  inventoryTransactions InventoryTransaction[]

  @@unique([workspaceId, poNumber])
  @@index([workspaceId, status])
  @@index([workspaceId, vendorId])
  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([companyId, templateId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  letterOfCredits LetterOfCredit[]
}

model Workspace {
  id           String       @id @default(uuid())
  // Owner of the workspace (system-level user)
  ownerUserId  String       @unique
  type         WorkspaceType   @default(OWNER)
  status       WorkspaceStatus @default(ACTIVE)
  // Workspace-level per-firm trial info
  trialStartsAt DateTime?
  trialEndsAt DateTime?
  trialUsed   Boolean @default(false)
  maxCompanies Int     @default(0)
  // Track total companies created (including deleted ones)
  companiesCreated Int @default(0)
  // Denormalized active non-owner users count (accepted invites, non-owners)
  activeNonOwnerUsersCount Int @default(0) @map("active_non_owner_users_count")
  // Denormalized active company count (isActive = true)
  activeCompaniesCount Int @default(0) @map("active_companies_count")
  baseCurrency String           @default("USD")

  createdAt    DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime     @updatedAt
  deletedAt    DateTime?

  owner              User              @relation("WorkspaceOwner", fields: [ownerUserId], references: [id])
  users              WorkspaceUser[]
  auditLogs          AuditLog[]
  events             EventLog[]
  Contact            Contact[]
  contactAddresses   ContactAddress[]
  contactCustomFields ContactCustomField[]
  Role               Role[]
  invites            WorkspaceInvite[]
  tasks              Task[]
  aiInsights         AiInsight[]
  aiModels           AiModel[]
  featureStores      FeatureStore[]

  predictions        Prediction[]
  aiAgents           AiAgent[]
  aiChatSessions     AiChatSession[]
  aiQueryLogs        AiQueryLog[]
  aiGovernanceRules  AiGovernanceRule[]
  aiAuditLogs        AiAuditLog[]
  dataQualityScores  DataQualityScore[]
  // Companies and practices under workspace (multi-company & firm support)
  companies          Company[]
  practices          Practice[]
  capabilities       WorkspaceCapabilities?
  RecurringInvoice   RecurringInvoice[]
  InvoicePaymentApplication  InvoicePaymentApplication[]

  CustomerCredit             CustomerCredit[]

  recurringSchedules        RecurringSchedule[]
  revaluations              Revaluation[]
  reversals                 Reversal[]

  savedReports              SavedReport[]

newString:
model Budget {
  id          String         @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId String         @map("tenantId")
  name        String
  scenario    BudgetScenario @default(ACTUAL)
  status      BudgetStatus   @default(DRAFT)
  fiscalYear  Int
  totalAmount Decimal?       @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now())

  workspace Workspace       @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  lines  BudgetLine[]

  @@index([workspaceId, fiscalYear])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  budgetActualComparisons BudgetActualComparison[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to Budget for missing relations

newString:
model ApiKey {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId String?  @map("tenantId")
  key         String   @unique
  ownerId     String?
  systemType  String   // e.g., BANK_API, PAYROLL_API, WEBHOOK
  /// JSON permissions map, e.g., { "read": true, "write": false }
  permissions Json
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  revokedAt   DateTime?

  workspace Workspace? @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  owner User? @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id])

  @@index([workspaceId])
  @@index([ownerId])
  @@index([systemType])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  externalSystemAccessLogs ExternalSystemAccessLog[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to ApiKey for missing relations

newString:
model ExternalSystemConfig {
  id          String            @id @default(uuid())
  systemType  IntegrationType
  name        String
  /// JSON configuration for credentials, endpoints, and vendor-specific settings.
  /// Recommended to version this JSON in application code.
  configJson  Json
  /// Encrypted secrets (tokens, API keys). Encrypt/decrypt in app layer.
  encryptedConfig Json?
  status      IntegrationStatus @default(ACTIVE)
  lastSyncAt  DateTime?
  // Optional per-integration rate limit controls
  rateLimitRequests      Int?
  rateLimitPeriodSeconds Int?
  /// Optional notification settings (email/slack/webhook)
  notificationChannels Json?
  createdAt   DateTime          @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime          @updatedAt

  workspaceId String? @map("tenantId")
  companyId   String?

  workspace Workspace? @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  company   Company?   @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  audits    ExternalSystemAudit[]
  syncJobs  SyncJob[]

  @@index([systemType])
  @@index([workspaceId])
  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([status])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  externalEntities ExternalEntity[]
}
explanation: Add opposite relations to ExternalSystemConfig for missing relations
